pi_items.source: Code inspection: MockSecurityProvider.getFallbackKey() returns 'TEST-KEY-000000' directly at line 90 of setup_task.sh
Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 8, PROJECT_DIR variable definition
Confirmed in export_result.sh line 9 and task.json description

privileged_info_summary: The legacy authentication system task generates a synthetic Java project with a key derivation scheme. The production security provider derives the emergency fallback key 'AUTH-V2-US-EAST-KEY-742-BETA' by concatenating protocol version (AUTH-V2), region prefix (US-EAST), and two internal segments (KEY-742 and BETA). A decoy mock provider returns 'TEST-KEY-000000'. The project is created at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/LegacyAuthSystem and the agent must save the correct key to /home/ga/fallback_key.txt without modifying source code.
